items.question: How can I verify it's truly synthetic?
items.answer: We provide a detailed compliance report with independent audit. Synthetic images can be identified through forensic analysis if needed.

items.question: Do you have RGPD proof?
items.answer: Yes, we provide RGPD certification signed by our DPO with full technical audit report.

items.question: Can you generate custom datasets?
items.answer: Absolutely! Pro and Enterprise plans offer customizations. Talk to our sales team.

items.question: What's the quality compared to real images?
items.answer: Our 1024×1024 quality is perfect for training. Higher resolution available on request.

items.question: Can I combine with my real data?
items.answer: Yes, that's a common use case! FaceSynth can augment your existing real datasets.

items.question: What's the delivery time?
items.answer: Starter: 2-3 days. Pro: 1-2 weeks. Enterprise: TBD.

items.question: What's your guarantee?
items.answer: 100% RGPD compliance guarantee or full refund. Technical support for minimum 12 months.

footer.tagline: FaceSynth – Synthetic data for responsible AI
